title: Fertilizer Dosage Calculator
description: Industrial-grade calculator for optimal fertilizer application rates based on crop needs, soil analysis, and application efficiency, following ISO 14051, Lean Six Sigma, and WERC guidelines.

inputs.label: Crop Type
inputs.businessContext: Determines the nitrogen (N), phosphorus (P), and potassium (K) uptake coefficients from agronomic tables.

businessContext_i18n.en: Determines the nitrogen (N), phosphorus (P), and potassium (K) uptake coefficients from agronomic tables.

inputs.label: Target Yield
inputs.businessContext: Expected harvest per hectare, used to calculate total nutrient demand.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected harvest per hectare, used to calculate total nutrient demand.

inputs.label: Soil Nitrogen (N) Content
inputs.businessContext: Measured from soil test; influences the amount of N fertilizer needed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Measured from soil test; influences the amount of N fertilizer needed.

inputs.label: Soil Phosphorus (P) Content
inputs.businessContext: Measured from soil test; influences the amount of P fertilizer needed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Measured from soil test; influences the amount of P fertilizer needed.

inputs.label: Soil Potassium (K) Content
inputs.businessContext: Measured from soil test; influences the amount of K fertilizer needed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Measured from soil test; influences the amount of K fertilizer needed.

inputs.label: Application Efficiency Factor
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of applied fertilizer that is actually taken up by the crop; affected by method, timing, and weather.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of applied fertilizer that is actually taken up by the crop; affected by method, timing, and weather.

inputs.label: Nitrogen Fertilizer Type
inputs.businessContext: Different sources have different N concentration and loss characteristics.

businessContext_i18n.en: Different sources have different N concentration and loss characteristics.

inputs.label: Phosphorus Fertilizer Type
inputs.businessContext: Different sources have different P concentration and solubility.

businessContext_i18n.en: Different sources have different P concentration and solubility.

inputs.label: Potassium Fertilizer Type
inputs.businessContext: Different sources have different K concentration and salt index.

businessContext_i18n.en: Different sources have different K concentration and salt index.

inputs.label: Soil Moisture Content
inputs.businessContext: Affects nutrient availability and leaching risk; used in loss adjustment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Affects nutrient availability and leaching risk; used in loss adjustment.

inputs.label: Rainfall Forecast (next 7 days)
inputs.businessContext: Expected precipitation; high rainfall increases N loss via leaching and denitrification.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected precipitation; high rainfall increases N loss via leaching and denitrification.

inputs.label: Soil Organic Matter
inputs.businessContext: Contributes to nutrient supply; higher OM reduces fertilizer requirement.

businessContext_i18n.en: Contributes to nutrient supply; higher OM reduces fertilizer requirement.

rules.message: Soil nitrogen is high relative to target yield; consider reducing N application to avoid over-fertilization.
High rainfall forecast may reduce efficiency; consider split application or use of inhibitors.
Very dry soil; fertilizer may not dissolve properly. Consider irrigation or delayed application.

thresholds.message: Nitrogen application rate exceeds recommended limits for environmental safety.
Phosphorus application rate may cause runoff and eutrophication.

formulas.label: Nitrogen Demand (kg N/ha)
formulas.description: Calculates total N required by the crop to achieve target yield.

formulas.label: Phosphorus Demand (kg P2O5/ha)
formulas.description: Calculates total P2O5 required by the crop.

formulas.label: Potassium Demand (kg K2O/ha)
formulas.description: Calculates total K2O required by the crop.

formulas.label: Soil Nitrogen Supply (kg N/ha)
formulas.description: Estimates N available from soil based on soil test and organic matter.

formulas.label: Net Nitrogen Requirement (kg N/ha)
formulas.description: Demand minus soil supply, adjusted for efficiency.

formulas.label: Net Phosphorus Requirement (kg P2O5/ha)
formulas.description: Demand minus soil supply, adjusted for efficiency.

formulas.label: Net Potassium Requirement (kg K2O/ha)
formulas.description: Demand minus soil supply, adjusted for efficiency.

formulas.label: Nitrogen Fertilizer Rate (kg product/ha)
formulas.description: Converts net N requirement to product rate based on fertilizer type.

formulas.label: Phosphorus Fertilizer Rate (kg product/ha)
formulas.description: Converts net P2O5 requirement to product rate.

formulas.label: Potassium Fertilizer Rate (kg product/ha)
formulas.description: Converts net K2O requirement to product rate.

formulas.label: Nitrogen Loss Factor
formulas.description: Adjusts for leaching and denitrification based on rainfall and soil moisture.

formulas.label: Adjusted Nitrogen Rate (kg product/ha)
formulas.description: Final N fertilizer rate after loss adjustment.

formulas.label: Adjusted Phosphorus Rate (kg product/ha)
formulas.description: Final P fertilizer rate (no loss adjustment for P).

formulas.label: Adjusted Potassium Rate (kg product/ha)
formulas.description: Final K fertilizer rate (no loss adjustment for K).

formulas.label: Total Fertilizer Cost (USD/ha)
formulas.description: Sum of cost for all three fertilizers using default unit prices.

formulas.label: Recommended Total Fertilizer Application Rate (kg product/ha)
formulas.description: Sum of all adjusted fertilizer rates as the primary output.

primary.label: Recommended Total Fertilizer Application Rate
primary.description: Total mass of fertilizer products to apply per hectare.

nitrogen.label: Nitrogen Fertilizer Rate
nitrogen.description: Adjusted rate of N fertilizer product.

phosphorus.label: Phosphorus Fertilizer Rate
phosphorus.description: Adjusted rate of P fertilizer product.

potassium.label: Potassium Fertilizer Rate
potassium.description: Adjusted rate of K fertilizer product.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Nitrogen Leaching Potential
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Estimated N lost due to leaching based on rainfall and soil moisture.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Denitrification Risk
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Percentage of applied N lost as N2O/N2 due to anaerobic conditions.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Phosphorus Runoff Risk
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Estimated P lost if rainfall exceeds 50 mm.

suggestedActions.label: Use split application for nitrogen
suggestedActions.description: Apply N in 2-3 splits to reduce loss and improve uptake efficiency.

suggestedActions.label: Incorporate fertilizer into soil
suggestedActions.description: Banding or injection reduces volatilization and runoff.

suggestedActions.label: Consider nitrification inhibitor
suggestedActions.description: Slows conversion of ammonium to nitrate, reducing leaching.

suggestedActions.label: Adjust timing based on weather forecast
suggestedActions.description: Avoid application before heavy rain events.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Data Confidence Adjusted Factor
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: Multiplier (0.8-1.2) reflecting reliability of input data; based on completeness and variability.
